explanations.2: This sets only the left border width to 5px; the other sides have no border unless defined elsewhere.
explanations.4: This creates a subtle shadow effect around the box using RGBA (a color format with transparency), with the shadow spreading 5px and being 10% opaque black.
explanations.20: Letter-spacing adds extra space between each character to make the title more spaced out and readable.
explanations.24: This indents the content 2.5rem from the left, which typically aligns it under the icon in the header above.
explanations.25: Opacity at 0.9 makes the text slightly see-through (90% visible), creating a lighter, secondary appearance.
